name: Prize Winning Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Tomato Juice or Tomato Sauce
3/4 Cup Quaker® Oats (Quick or Old Fashioned), uncooked
recipeInstructions:
1. May substitute 2 egg whites.
2. Heat oven to 350°F.
3. Combine all ingredients; mix lightly but thoroughly.
4. Press into 8 x 4-inch loaf pan.
5. Bake for 1 hour, or until meat is no longer pink and juices run clear.
6. Drain; let stand 5 minutes before slicing.
8 SERVINGS
8 MINI-LOAVES
Nutrition Information per serving:
Calories: 240
Calories From Fat: 144
Total Fat: 16g
Saturated Fat: 6g
Cholesterol: 85mg
Sodium: 170mg
Total Carbohydrates: 7g
Dietary Fiber: 1g
Protein: 17g
